summary: Accepted clarification: graph is a map/state index that locates sources of truth; implementation must read documentation builds, roadmap items, KB specs, validation reports, and code/tests directly before semantic changes.

accepted_decisions.summary: Graph is the map/index/router over CodeWiki truth, not the source that decides intended behavior.
Implementation uses graph/state to locate relevant documentation_build, roadmap item, KB specs, validation reports, and code/test paths, then reads those sources directly.
Docs and skills should avoid wording that implies graph replaces or decides source-of-truth semantics.

non_goals: Do not change graph generation semantics beyond documentation/prompt wording.
